title: agrostis tenuis var. aristata
intro: Agrostis tenuis var. aristata, also known as aristate bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Agrostis tenuis var. aristata include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Agrostis tenuis var. aristata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and roots of the plant.
